prompt: Create a Toast notification component with success, error, warning, and info variants
expected_behavior: Creates 3 files in preview/src/components/Toast/: Toast.tsx, Toast.module.css, Toast.figma.tsx. Component has variant prop with 4 options, uses design tokens, passes DSL validation. Registered in index.ts.
validation: Toast.module.css uses design token CSS variables
Toast.figma.tsx maps all 4 variants to figma.enum
index.ts contains Toast export below END marker

prompt: Build me a card component with an image, title, description, and optional badge
expected_behavior: Creates ContentCard component with props for image, title, description, and optional badge. CSS Module handles image aspect ratio and text truncation. Code Connect maps string props.
validation: Component accepts image, title, description, badge props
CSS handles image layout with proper aspect ratio
Code Connect uses figma.string for text props and figma.boolean for badge

prompt: I need a dropdown menu with items that can have icons
expected_behavior: Creates Dropdown component with trigger element and menu items. Each item accepts an optional icon, label, and onClick handler. CSS Module handles positioning and hover states.
validation: Menu items accept icon and label props
CSS handles absolute positioning and z-index
